headline: Dish files for bankruptcy, but not shutting down
summary: Dish, operator of Dish TV and Sling TV, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. This move allows the EchoStar-owned company to wind down its wireless operations. The bankruptcy follows unforeseen delays in selling 5G spectrum.

headline: Amazon fined $2.25 million for failing to help identity theft victims
summary: Amazon has been fined $2.25 million by the FTC. The fine addresses claims the company failed to assist identity theft victims. Amazon allegedly refused to provide information on fraudulent purchases.

headline: Acer's Swift Go 16 is a lot of laptop for $900
summary: The Acer Swift Go 16 AI laptop is on sale for $899.99 at Best Buy. This represents a steep discount from its original $1,549.99 price. It offers strong value given current high memory and storage costs.

headline: Google's NotebookLM can sum up your research in a TikTok-style clip
summary: Google's NotebookLM is adding new TikTok-style AI video summaries. Subscribers to Google AI Ultra and Pro can generate 60-second vertical AI clips. These clips are based on source materials uploaded to the app.

headline: Civilization 7 Review Update
summary: A year and a half of updates have brought meaningful improvements to Civilization 7. The review update highlights advancements made to the game. However, a few steps backward were also noted.

headline: Everything Coming to Disney+ in July
summary: This article details all new content arriving on Disney+ in July. Viewers can anticipate a fresh lineup of shows and movies. It provides a comprehensive list of upcoming releases.

headline: Daigo Says 'Random' State of Street Fighter 6 Is Good for Casuals, but Makes It Hard to Crown a GOAT
summary: Daigo Umehara comments on the current state of Street Fighter 6. He believes the game's 'random' style benefits casual players. However, this randomness makes it challenging to identify the greatest player.

headline: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey Gets Official Roblox Tie-In Game
summary: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' now has an official Roblox tie-in game. Players can experience this new game on the Roblox platform. The tie-in is available for play right now.

headline: Starmer trims budgets to fund extra £15bn for defence
summary: Keir Starmer plans to allocate an additional £15 billion to UK defence. This funding will be secured by trimming other existing budgets. The plan outlines future spending on equipping the armed forces.

headline: Why Starmer's defence plan leaves next PM with £4.7bn headache
summary: Keir Starmer's announced defence spending creates a future financial challenge. His plan leaves the next Prime Minister with a £4.7 billion issue. Defence spending remains a tricky issue for the incoming administration.

headline: Patient tests negative after Ebola alert at Glasgow hospital
summary: A patient at Queen Elizabeth University Hospital in Glasgow triggered an Ebola alert. Precautionary measures were taken upon the patient's admission. Subsequent tests confirmed the patient tested negative for Ebola.

headline: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
summary: The US Supreme Court has affirmed birthright citizenship. This ruling is a significant setback for Donald Trump's immigration policies. Civil rights groups have welcomed the Supreme Court's decision.
